commands.review_summary:
The PR tightens memory-core numeric option parsing, enforces memory-wiki `wiki apply --confidence` range validation, adds focused regression tests, and adjusts transcript repair for signed-thinking legacy tool-result replay.

PR surface: Source +63, Tests +70. Total +133 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection. Current main uses raw `Number(value)` for the affected memory options and wiki confidence flag, so malformed inputs can reach command runtime as `NaN`, `Infinity`, or out-of-range values; this read-only review did not run the CLI.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is indicated; maintainer review should decide the compatibility tradeoff and wait for or resolve the current CI state.

target.title: fix(memory): reject invalid CLI numeric options
target.body:
## Summary
- Reject non-finite memory CLI numeric options before command runtime for `memory search` and `memory promote`.
- Enforce `wiki apply --confidence` as a finite 0..1 value before metadata mutation.
- Preserve signed-thinking assistant turns for the legacy single-tool-result transcript shape, while keeping duplicate tool ids guarded.

## Verification
Behavior addressed: invalid memory/wiki numeric CLI inputs now fail in Commander parsing before command actions run; signed-thinking Anthropic replay keeps the assistant turn and lets pairing repair synthesize the legacy unlinked tool result.
Real environment tested: local checkout, Node/Vitest through repo wrapper, CLI via `pnpm openclaw`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/cli.test.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/cli.test.ts`; `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/session-transcript-repair.ts extensions/memory-core/src/cli.ts extensions/memory-core/src/cli.test.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/cli.ts extensions/memory-wiki/src/cli.test.ts`; `git diff --check`; `pnpm openclaw memory search hello --max-results nope --json`; `pnpm openclaw wiki apply synthesis CLIProof --body proof --source-id source.alpha --confidence 1.5 --json`; `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`.
Evidence after fix: focused Vitest passed 4 files / 200 tests; oxfmt and `git diff --check` passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings.
Observed result after fix: `memory search --max-results nope` exits 1 with `option '--max-results <n>' argument 'nope' is invalid. --max-results must be a finite number.`; `wiki apply ... --confidence 1.5` exits 1 with `option '--confidence <n>' argument '1.5' is invalid. --confidence must be a number between 0 and 1.`; the previously failing signed-thinking replay sanitizer test now passes.
What was not tested: full CI locally; GitHub CI is running on the pushed branch.
target.author: steipete
